programme.desc: Worst Episode Ever: Bart and Milhouse end up running Comic Book Guy's shop after he has a heart attack. And, while he recovers, Comic Book Guy falls in love...

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Tennis the Menace: Homer builds a tennis court in the back garden but becomes jealous of Bart's tennis skills and swears revenge at the Krusty Klassic tournament.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Dead on a Rival: Mitchell learns a valuable life lesson when Murray shows up unexpectedly. And the Dunphys' old neighbour Kenneth, who's now a tech titan, visits.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Paris: The family head to Paris so that Jay can accept a lifetime achievement award for his work in the closet industry. But his old nemesis, Earl Chambers, haunts him.

programme.title: Married at First Sight UK:...
programme.desc: ...Reunion Special: Brand new - Revelations and a fiery showdown are served as the class of 2025 reunite at an explosive dinner party.

programme.title: Celebrity Coach Trip
programme.desc: Celebs including Matt Richardson, Will Best, Linda Robson, Lesley Joseph, Paul Danan, and Célena and Mariama from the Honeyz board Brendan Sheerin's big bus in northern Portugal.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The Mook, the Chef, the Wife and Her Homer: Homer becomes the boss of Fat Tony's mob when Tony's son decides to become a chef rather than go into the family business.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Jazzy and the Pussycats: Bart takes up playing the drums, upstages Lisa and joins a top jazz band. So Lisa turns her back on music and starts rescuing animals instead.

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Dillon leans on Lucas for support, but will sparks re-ignite between the former lovers? Elsewhere, a mum confides in her friends at a yoga class.

programme.title: New: Married at First Sight...
programme.desc: ...Australia - Brand new series: MAFS Australia is back with a fresh batch of Aussie singles ready to wed sight unseen, starting with a jaw-dropping moment at the altar.

programme.title: New: Laid
programme.desc: Brand new series - Brandon from College: Twisted mystery romcom with Stephanie Hsu. When Ruby's ex-lovers start dying in unusual ways, she must confront her sex timeline. (Ep1/8)

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The top TV includes Jamie's £1 Wonders, Married at First Sight Australia, Only Connect, Sex Actually with Alice Levine, Fall and Naked and Afraid.

programme.title: The Equalizer
programme.desc: (2014) Thriller. Denzel Washington stars as an ex-soldier who comes out of retirement to help a teenage sex worker who's been assaulted by her pimp.

programme.title: The Lavender Hill Mob

programme.title: Annie
programme.desc: (2014) Jamie Foxx stars in this reboot of the 1982 musical. Orphan Annie is transported to post-2008 recession-hit New York, where she becomes the ward of a germaphobe running for mayor.

programme.title: The Day the Earth Stood Still
programme.desc: (2008) Remake of the sci-fi classic with Keanu Reeves. An alien visits Earth to tell humankind to stop destroying the planet. But when he's attacked, he decides to eradicate us instead...

programme.desc: (2016) Action-comedy with Dwayne Johnson and Kevin Hart. Two former school buddies team up to thwart a terrorist plot. But things may not be as they seem. With Amy Ryan and Jason Bateman.

programme.title: The Menu
programme.desc: (2022) Horror with Ralph Fiennes and Anya Taylor-Joy. Only one diner at an exclusive eatery sees through the foam quenelles to the pile of steaming prairie oysters beyond. Mayhem ensues.

programme.title: Orphan: First Kill
programme.desc: (2022) Horror prequel with Isabelle Fuhrman and Julia Stiles. Diminutive psychopath Esther - think Wednesday at a funeral - cons her way into a family to wreak murderous mayhem.

programme.title: The Bill

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: In Deep: A barrister's daughter with a cocaine habit is pushed out of a car by her supplier when she doesn't settle her debts. Terry goes undercover at the suspected dealer's cab company.

programme.title: 999 Rescue Squad
programme.desc: A man is left with a metal spike impaled in his face after a traumatic incident on a construction site, sparking a huge rescue operation. Plus, medics help a man who was hit by a car.

programme.title: Nurses on the Ward
programme.desc: Matron Hazera responds to an emergency and battles to find enough staff, while Renee treats a patient with a flare-up of ulcerative colitis and Sarah cares for a terminally ill patient.

programme.title: The Catherine Tate Show
programme.desc: Another round of fantastic comedy characters. In this show, Elaine Figgis seeks true love via a website, and the equally versatile Paul Whitehouse turns up as Sam's dad.

programme.title: The Catherine Tate Show
programme.desc: More from the award-winning comedy sketch series performed by the talented Ms Tate. Characters this time include Derek Faye, Lauren and a rather annoying waitress.

programme.desc: Father-of-three Chris undergoes high risk brain surgery and mental health nurse Kate is called into a police station to treat a confused woman at risk of self-harm.

programme.title: My Family
programme.desc: While You Weren't Sleeping: The popular domestic sitcom starring Robert Lindsay and Zoe Wanamaker. There are problems in the bedroom which threaten to drive Ben and Susan apart.

programme.title: My Family

programme.title: My Family
programme.desc: A Wife Less Ordinary: Comedy from the bonkers Harpers. Susan, bored with her lot, opts to run her life as a single girl again. Janey takes the opportunity to try running the home.

programme.title: My Family
programme.desc: The Book of Love: Domestic sitcom with a great cast. Susan attends a neighbour's book club. Michael runs a booking agency exclusively for Roger, while Ben books a seat on the sofa.

programme.title: My Family
programme.desc: Going Dental: Susan forsakes Ben's dental conference to write her novel. Ben seeks a new partnership in Harley Street but ends up with more partners than he had bargained for.

programme.desc: Oz, Ollie & Bayleigh: Labrador puppy Ollie is rushed in after being hit by a car, while Bullmastiff Bayleigh has a painful lump near her ankle and adventurous cat Oz's leg needs saving.

programme.desc: Merida, Tito & Monti: Rough Collie puppy Merida has deformed front legs, fidgety Cockapoo Monti has fractured his knee and Weimaraner Tito is brought in after being hit by a van.

programme.desc: Rogan, Brodie & Vinnie: Noel treats Boston Terrier Rogan's debilitating dysplasia and creates an implant for Hungarian Vizsla Brodie, while a cat has leg injuries after being hit by a car.

programme.desc: The paramedics treat a young mum with severe stomach pains, take a breathless pensioner to hospital and attend an elderly lady with dementia whose nose will not stop bleeding.
